examples.sentence: When all is said and done, the project's success depended on the team's hard work and dedication.
examples.translation: In the end, the success of the project was due to the team's effort and commitment.

examples.sentence: We debated for hours, but when all is said and done, the decision rests with the board of directors.
examples.translation: After all discussions, the final decision is made by the board of directors.

examples.sentence: She knew that when all is said and done, her family’s happiness mattered most.
examples.translation: Ultimately, what was most important to her was the happiness of her family.

examples.sentence: When all is said and done, this report will summarize the findings clearly and concisely.
examples.translation: After everything has been considered, this report will provide a clear and concise summary of the findings.

examples.sentence: I'll agree to that plan when Hell freezes over; it's just not going to happen.
examples.translation: I will never agree to that plan; it is impossible.

examples.sentence: Do you think he'll ever apologize? Yeah, when Hell freezes over!
examples.translation: Do you believe he will apologize? No, never!

examples.sentence: They said they'd pay us on time when Hell freezes over, so I don’t hold my breath.
examples.translation: They promised to pay on time, but I strongly doubt they will ever do it.

examples.sentence: I was hesitant to try the local customs at first, but then I remembered: when in Rome, you do as the Romans do.
examples.translation: Initially, I was reluctant to follow local customs, but then I realized one should adapt when visiting a place.

examples.sentence: When you visit another country, it's best to respect their traditions — after all, when in Rome.
examples.translation: When traveling abroad, you should honor local traditions because it's appropriate to adapt.

examples.sentence: My parents told me, 'When in Rome, eat what the Romans eat,' so I tried that unusual dish.
examples.translation: My parents advised me to try local foods when visiting, so I tasted the local specialty.

examples.sentence: Everyone at the office takes a long lunch on Fridays, and I figured, when in Rome, I might as well join them.
examples.translation: Since everyone at work takes long lunch breaks on Fridays, I decided to do the same.

examples.sentence: She usually prefers tea, but when in Rome, she drank coffee with the rest of us.
examples.translation: Although she normally drinks tea, she adapted to drinking coffee like the others.

examples.sentence: We don't usually celebrate Halloween, but when in Rome, we dressed up for the party.
examples.translation: Although we don't normally celebrate Halloween, we joined in by dressing up when at the party.

examples.sentence: When in Rome, do as the Romans do — so I learned a few phrases in Italian to blend in better.
examples.translation: It’s best to follow local customs, so I practiced Italian to fit in.

examples.sentence: My grandmother always told me, ‘When in Rome, do as the Romans do,’ to remind me to respect other cultures.
examples.translation: My grandmother advised me to adapt to local customs and respect other cultures.

examples.sentence: We went wine tasting in France, and when in Rome, do as the Romans do — we sampled everything!
examples.translation: Following the local practice, we tried all the wines during our visit to France.

examples.sentence: Although I don’t usually eat spicy food, when in Rome, do as the Romans do—it’s part of the experience.
examples.translation: Even though I dislike spicy food, I ate it to follow local customs.

examples.sentence: When at the yoga retreat, she decided that when in Rome, do as the Romans do, and joined every morning session.
examples.translation: At the retreat, she adapted by participating fully in the local routine.

examples.sentence: He rarely drinks alcohol, but when at the festival, when in Rome, do as the Romans do, so he raised a glass with everyone.
examples.translation: Though he usually avoids alcohol, he toasted with others to fit in at the festival.

examples.sentence: When it comes to cooking, Sarah is an expert who knows all the best recipes.
examples.translation: Regarding cooking, Sarah is highly skilled and knowledgeable.

examples.sentence: You can’t argue when it comes to John’s dedication; he always gives his best.
examples.translation: Concerning John’s dedication, it is undeniable that he always tries hard.

examples.sentence: When it comes to finding solutions, our team works very efficiently under pressure.
examples.translation: Regarding problem-solving, our team performs well even when stressed.
